_comment: ERServer configuration (§20). Copy this file to 'erserver.config.json' next to
the ERServer executable (or pass --config <path>). The daemon reads ALL of its
settings from this one JSON document - nothing from the process environment.
Every key is optional; an omitted section falls back to defaults. Omitting the
'database' section (or leaving connectionString empty) runs the server sim-only,
with no persistence (auth then reports DbUnavailable).
server.statusPort enables the OPTIONAL out-of-band diagnostic status port (§21):
a SEPARATE read-only UDP port the debug client's F3 server-status overlay polls
for live connection / object / telemetry counters. 0 (default) disables it. The
endpoint is compiled ONLY into _DEBUG server builds, so a retail build ignores
this key. It is read-only and answers only the fixed status query token, but it
is still a diagnostics channel - only enable it on a trusted operator network.
